patch:
--- a/mux_selector.v
+++ b/mux_selector.v
@@ -1,17 +1,17 @@
 module mux_selector (
   input [31:0] data_in0,
   input [31:0] data_in1,
   input [31:0] data_in2,
   input [31:0] data_in3,
   input [1:0] select,
   input enable,
   output reg [31:0] data_out
 );
 
-  always @(data_in0 or data_in1 or data_in2 or data_in3 or select) begin
+  always @(*) begin
     if (enable) begin
       case (select)
         2'b00: data_out = data_in0;
         2'b01: data_out = data_in1;
         2'b10: data_out = data_in2;
         2'b11: data_out = data_in3;
       endcase
     end else
       data_out = 32'b0;
   end
 
 endmodule
